result.vlm_summary:
page_state:
Booking.com Zurich search results page with filters applied; 5 properties found. One visible result card is “Glärnischhof by TRINITY” with rating 8.3 and breakfast included.
task_relevant_visible_text:
“Zurich: 5 properties found”; “Very Good: 8+”; “Breakfast included”; “Hotels”; “Free cancellation”; “Glärnischhof by TRINITY”; “Very Good 8.3”; “Location 9.3”; “Breakfast included”; “Per night $253”; “1 night, 2 adults”
selected_candidate:
Glärnischhof by TRINITY
constraint_evidence:
- Zurich location: supported (“Zurich” in search bar/results)
- rating 8.5 or above: contradicted for visible candidate (8.3 shown); other results not visible
- free breakfast: supported for visible candidate (“Breakfast included”)
- sauna facilities: not_visible
- stay starting January 20, 2026: contradicted by visible date selector (“Mon, Mar 2 — Tue, Mar 3”)
- four nights: not_visible/contradicted by visible stay length (“1 night”)
- hotel category: supported (“Hotels” filter and hotel result card)
action_target:
Exit / send message to user “[EXIT]”
success_signals:
A qualifying hotel card would show Zurich, rating >=8.5, free breakfast, sauna, and dates matching Jan 20, 2026 for 4 nights.
failure_signals:
Visible candidate rating is only 8.3; dates are Mar 2–3 instead of Jan 20, 2026; stay length shows 1 night; sauna not shown.
uncertainty:
Other search results may satisfy the constraints, but they are not visible in this screenshot.

task_context.task: navigate: Locate a hotel in Zurich rated 8.5 or above, offering free breakfast and sauna facilities, for a stay starting from January 20, 2026, for four nights.
task_context.title: Booking.com | Official site | The best hotels, flights, car rentals & accommodations

observation.title: Booking.com | Official site | The best hotels, flights, car rentals & accommodations

args.query: Booking.com hotel search: result visible but rating/date/stay length constraints not satisfied; candidate shows breakfast included but sauna/date mismatch; missed or wrong result on hotel selection

items.summary: The agent returned a plausible result that missed qualifiers in the user's request.
items.fix_hint: Extract qualifiers such as recency, thresholds, or category before evaluating candidate results.

items.summary: The agent used broad browsing steps instead of applying the available search or filter controls.
items.fix_hint: Prefer task-specific search inputs and filters when the target can be narrowed directly.

items.summary: The agent completed a search task but did not enforce an explicit user constraint before stopping.
items.fix_hint: Track hard constraints separately from the main goal and verify them against the final page state before returning success.

args.query: Booking.com Zurich hotel search result selected with unmet constraints rating 8.5+, free breakfast, sauna, Jan 20 2026, four nights

args.expected_behavior: The final selected hotel/result should satisfy all hard constraints: Zurich location, rating at least 8.5, free breakfast, sauna facilities, start date January 20, 2026, and a four-night stay.
args.actual_behavior: The run stopped on a Zurich results page, but the visible candidate was Glärnischhof by TRINITY with rating 8.3, the visible date selector showed Mar 2–3, and the stay length showed 1 night; sauna was not shown. The agent exited without verifying a qualifying hotel.
args.regression_rule: Before exiting on hotel-search tasks, verify every explicit hard constraint on the selected candidate or continue filtering/searching until a candidate visibly matches all constraints; do not treat a partially matching hotel as success.

evidence.claim: The final page was a Zurich booking results page with hotel filters and listing cards visible.
The visible selected candidate was Glärnischhof by TRINITY.
The visible candidate’s rating was 8.3, which is below the required 8.5 threshold.
The visible stay dates were Mar 2–3 rather than the requested January 20, 2026 start date, and the stay length showed 1 night rather than 4 nights.
Sauna facilities were not visible for the selected candidate.
The trajectory ended with an exit message instead of further searching/filtering or selecting a qualifying hotel.

suggested_followups.label: Check filters
suggested_followups.message: Should I verify which Booking.com filters were applied and whether sauna/date filters were missing?

suggested_followups.label: Find better match
suggested_followups.message: Would you like me to search for the first Zurich hotel that matches rating, breakfast, sauna, and the Jan 20, 2026 date?
